texto: Our friendship was based on my payouts. That wasn't a friendship when - as, for example, it's me, my friends, we are friends for many years, and it doesn't matter for me what the position is, where they work; we simply are friends. And with Mr. Berezovsky, our friendship was based on my payoffs.

frase_original: Our friendship was based on my payouts. And with Mr. Berezovsky, our friendship was based on my payoffs.
